No in between.

posts.content:
AI workout generators are trending.

But here's the truth:

No app replaces:
- Actually showing up
- Progressive overload
- Sleep
- Protein

The basics never change.
Comment "GAINS" if you want my 12-week transformation program for free.

posts.content:
Rate my gym stack 1-10:

- Strong app (workout tracking)

Total screen time down 40%.

posts.content:
January 1st: "This is my year"

January 8th: "I'll start Monday"

January 15th: "After this trip"

January 23rd: Still in the gym.

That's the difference.

Fitness apps making $100k+/mo:

- Opal: $600k/mo (focus/screen time)
- BePresent: $300k/mo (phone detox)
- Fitbod: $200k/mo (AI workouts)
- Strong: $150k/mo (workout logs)

Notice: None of them are complicated.

Simple problem. Simple solution. Consistent execution.
posts.notes: Data post for fitness app market.
